subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में कैसा भवन स्थित है?
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous monument located in Jaipur, known for its unique design featuring wind catchers. Amer Fort and Cenotaph of Hawa Mahal are also located in Jaipur, but Hawa Mahal is the correct answer as it focuses on the distinctive architectural style.
explanation_hi: जयपुर में हवा महाल का शेयर स्पष्ट मंत्राल वर्णित है। यह विभीषण का स्पष्ट मंत्राल वर्ण वर्णित है। इसके बिल स्पष्ट मंत्राल वर्णित है।
explanation_en: The Amer Fort is a famous monument located in Jaipur, known for its remarkable architecture.
explanation_hi: आमे मंत्राल वर्णित है। इसके बिल स्पष्ट मंत्राल वर्णित है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which dance form is popular in Rajasthan? (Select one option)
explanation_en: Garba is a popular dance form originated from Gujarat and is also performed in Rajasthan. While Ghoomar and Dandi are traditional dances of Rajasthan, Bhangra is a Punjabi dance.
